summary: Prove a restartable multi-task autonomous campaign end to end
description: Prove a restartable multi-task autonomous campaign end to end
acceptance: A non-toy fixture is built repaired criticised committed resumed and completed across multiple task budgets
Attempt artifacts and latest resume state prove every transition
The public template and stack checks stay green together

evidence.summary: 39 smoke tests pass; deterministic two-task agent campaign builds, receives critic BLOCK, repairs to PASS, commits, stops on task budget, executes persisted absolute resume command, completes second task, and passes final goal audit; stack/template make checks and diff checks pass together.
